title: Synchronizing dates with calendars with a FILTER
excerpt:
It’s easy enough to synchronize a calendar, but you are limited to choosing “Synchronize all dates” and “Synchronize dates assigned to me”. 
How great would it be if you could expand on this to synchronize dates with a f…

posts.author: BrendanHarris (Brendan Harris)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s easy enough to synchronize a calendar, but you are limited to choosing “Synchronize all dates” and “Synchronize dates assigned to me”.

How great would it be if you could expand on this to synchronize dates with a filter applied, for example - synchronize dates where status is “approved” or label “Out of office”?

This way you can avoid spamming your own calendar.

posts.author: APICaptain (Calum Klesel)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1
It would be very useful to sync a calendar consisting of a filtered set of items based on a non-date column’s value.
